routes.name: The Desert Crossing
routes.theme: Route 66 heritage and red rock country through the Southwest

highlights.name: Paso Robles Wine Country
highlights.description: Charming Central Coast wine town with hundreds of wineries and tasting rooms

highlights.name: Tehachapi Loop Railroad
highlights.description: Famous engineering marvel where trains loop over themselves to gain elevation

highlights.name: Wind Farm Fields
highlights.description: Dramatic landscape of thousands of wind turbines across the Tehachapi Pass

highlights.name: Roy's Cafe Amboy
highlights.description: Iconic Route 66 roadside cafe and gas station in the middle of the Mojave Desert

highlights.name: Route 66 Museum Kingman
highlights.description: Comprehensive museum celebrating the Mother Road's history and culture

highlights.name: Hualapai Mountain Park
highlights.description: Pine-forested mountain park rising above the desert with hiking trails and cooler temps

highlights.name: Oak Creek Canyon Scenic Drive
highlights.description: Stunning descent through a red rock canyon often called Arizona's Little Grand Canyon

highlights.name: Bell Rock Pathway
highlights.description: Easy dog-friendly trail around one of Sedona's most iconic red rock formations

highlights.name: Tlaquepaque Arts Village
highlights.description: Charming arts and crafts village modeled after a traditional Mexican town

highlights.name: West Fork Oak Creek Trail
highlights.description: One of Arizona's most beautiful canyon hikes through lush forest along a creek

highlights.name: Airport Mesa Overlook
highlights.description: Panoramic 360-degree views of Sedona's red rock formations, especially stunning at sunset

highlights.name: Rancho Sedona RV Park
highlights.description: Dog-friendly campground along Oak Creek with shade trees and creek access

highlights.name: Page Springs Cellars
highlights.description: Award-winning winery in the Verde Valley with a dog-friendly patio and creek views

highlights.name: Standin' on the Corner Park Winslow
highlights.description: Iconic Eagles song tribute on historic Route 66 — a must-stop photo op

highlights.name: Petrified Forest National Park
highlights.description: Ancient petrified wood and painted desert landscapes spanning 225 million years

highlights.name: El Rancho Hotel Gallup
highlights.description: Historic Route 66 hotel where classic Hollywood stars stayed during Western film shoots

highlights.name: Albuquerque Old Town
highlights.description: Historic adobe plaza with galleries, shops, and New Mexican cuisine dating to 1706

highlights.name: Petroglyph National Monument
highlights.description: Over 24,000 ancient petroglyphs carved into volcanic rock along Albuquerque's west mesa

highlights.name: Fishers Peak State Park
highlights.description: Colorado's newest state park with dramatic mesa views near the New Mexico border

highlights.name: Spanish Peaks Vista
highlights.description: Stunning views of the twin Spanish Peaks rising from the Colorado plains

highlights.name: Pikes Peak View
highlights.description: America's Mountain visible from the highway — an iconic Front Range landmark

routes.name: The Grand Canyon Route
routes.theme: Bucket-list national monuments through Arizona's canyon country

highlights.name: Paso Robles Wine Country
highlights.description: Renowned Central Coast wine region with over 200 wineries and excellent dining

highlights.name: Bearizona Wildlife Park
highlights.description: Drive-through wildlife park with bears, bison, and wolves in a ponderosa pine forest

highlights.name: Route 66 Historic Downtown Williams
highlights.description: Last town on Route 66 to be bypassed by the interstate, full of retro charm

highlights.name: Mather Point
highlights.description: The first and most iconic Grand Canyon viewpoint with sweeping canyon panoramas

highlights.name: Rim Trail
highlights.description: Paved, dog-friendly trail along the South Rim with continuous canyon views

highlights.name: Desert View Watchtower
highlights.description: Mary Colter-designed 70-foot stone tower with panoramic views of the canyon and Painted Desert

highlights.name: Shoshone Point
highlights.description: Secluded viewpoint reached by a peaceful mile-long forested walk — far fewer crowds

highlights.name: Mather Campground
highlights.description: Well-shaded campground within walking distance of the South Rim and village amenities

highlights.name: Hopi Point Sunset
highlights.description: One of the best sunset viewpoints on the South Rim with wide western exposure

highlights.name: Grand Canyon Dark Sky Park
highlights.description: Incredible stargazing at one of the darkest skies near a major national park

highlights.name: Cameron Trading Post
highlights.description: Historic Navajo trading post with a gallery, dining, and views of the Little Colorado River gorge

highlights.name: Moenkopi Dinosaur Tracks
highlights.description: Well-preserved dinosaur footprints displayed by Navajo guides along the roadside

highlights.name: Monument Valley
highlights.description: Iconic sandstone buttes of the Navajo Nation — one of the most photographed landscapes on Earth

highlights.name: Four Corners Monument
highlights.description: The only place in the US where four states meet — a fun roadside bucket-list stop

highlights.name: Mesa Verde National Park
highlights.description: Remarkable 700-year-old Ancestral Puebloan cliff dwellings carved into sandstone alcoves

highlights.name: Durango Dog Park

highlights.name: Animas River Trail

highlights.name: Carver Brewing Company

highlights.name: Smelter Mountain Trail

highlights.name: Million Dollar Highway

highlights.name: Silverton
highlights.description: Authentic 1880s mining town nestled in a high mountain valley at 9,318 feet

highlights.name: Black Canyon of the Gunnison
